name: Wealthfolio
compose:
name: slashnode-wealthfolio
services:
  server:
    image: wealthfolio/wealthfolio:3.5.3
    container_name: wealthfolio
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      WF_LISTEN_ADDR: 0.0.0.0:8088
      WF_DB_PATH: /data/wealthfolio.db
      WF_AUTH_REQUIRED: 'false'
      WF_AUTH_PASSWORD_HASH: ''
      WF_AUTH_TOKEN_TTL_MINUTES: '60'
      WF_CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS: ''
      WF_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS: '30000'
      WF_SECRET_KEY: ${secret.APP_WEALTHFOLIO_SECRET_KEY}
    volumes:
      - server_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8880:8088
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-wealthfolio_server_data
